lyrics.title: I Am What I Am
lyrics.content:
Every time I fall down
As soon as I hit the ground
Remind me who I am
And I get back up again
Getting up, getting up, yeah

This is my master plan
I'm gonna take a stand
Take it or leave it
I am what I am
I believe that I can
I'm gonna take command
Take it or leave it
I am what I am

I am what I am
I am what I am
Bending backwards trying to fit in
I'll make them understand
Take it or leave it
I am what I am

Devils inside my head
Late at night in my bed
It's time I shut you up, yeah
'Cause I think I've had enough
I've had enough, had enough, yeah

This is my master plan
I'm gonna take a stand
Take it or leave it
I am what I am
I believe that I can
I'm gonna take command
Take it or leave it
I am what I am

I am what I am

lyrics.title: Jien dak li jien
lyrics.content:
Kull darba li naqa'
Hekk kif nilqot l-art
Fakkarni min jien, yeah
U nerġa' nerġa' nqum
Tqum, tqum, yeah

Dan huwa l-masterplan tiegħi
Jien ser nieħu pożizzjoni
Ħuha jew ħalliha
Jien dak li jien
Nemmen li nista
Jien ser nieħu kmand
Ħuha jew ħalliha
Jien dak li jien

Jien dak li jien

Ħuha jew ħalliha
Jien dak li jien
